modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questions about KCS Contributor responsibilities in TeamDynamix

full_description_text:  
I’m trying to understand what it means to be a KCS Contributor.  
What are the specific responsibilities I need to know?  
I work with TeamDynamix and want to make sure I’m doing it right.  
Any details would be super helpful!
